programs.title: Security
programs.desc: A security guard protects an eleven-year-old girl who is being targeted by a gang.

programs.title: Replicant
programs.desc: An obsessed cop (Michael Rooker) and a clone (Jean-Claude Van Damme) try to catch a serial killer.

programs.title: Legionnaire
programs.desc: A 1920s playboy returns from a stint in the French Foreign Legion to reclaim his lover.

programs.title: City on Fire
programs.desc: An undercover cop (Chow Yun-Fat) infiltrates a gang of jewel thieves.

programs.title: Elephant White
programs.desc: An assassin has a midlife crisis after his contractor takes out a $1 million hit on him.

programs.title: Kandahar
programs.desc: A CIA operative fights enemy combatants as he tries to reach an extraction point in Afghanistan.
